scripts.test: pnpm --filter @jet/workspace test && pnpm --filter @jet/lsp test && pnpm --filter @jet/node-host test && pnpm --filter @jet/app test
scripts.test:electron: pnpm --filter @jet/node-host build && pnpm --filter jet-desktop build && playwright test --project=electron
scripts.test:bench: pnpm --filter @jet/node-host build && pnpm --filter jet-desktop build && playwright test --project=bench
scripts.postinstall: node scripts/ensure-electron.mjs && pnpm rebuild electron && node scripts/fix-node-pty-perms.mjs
